description: A player wants to change their in-game username.

nodes.task_description: Identify the player's account and check their eligibility for a username change.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the player has one free username change available.

nodes.task_description: Check if the desired new username is available and does not violate the naming policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the new username is available and appropriate.

nodes.task_description: Update the player's username in the account system.
